title: cyrtandra waiheae
intro: Cyrtandra waiheae, a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae, is a type of tropical herb native to Hawaii. The leaves and roots of Cyrtandra waiheae have been traditionally used in Hawaiian medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cyrtandra waiheae are said to include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and pneumonia. In herbal preparations, Cyrtandra waiheae is often made into a tea or infusion by steeping the leaves and roots in hot water, or used in combination with other herbs in a decoction to enhance its medicinal properties.
